title: Bride by Mistake
writer: Henry Ephron, Phoebe Ephron, Norman Krasna
actors: Alan Marshal, Laraine Day, Marsha Hunt
plot: Norah is very rich, owns her own shipyard and has Sylvia double for her at all outside functions. But Sylvia is now married and wants to go to Washington with her new husband while Norah's latest fiance has dumped her. Determined ...
